title: Antibiotics
body_html:
Antibiotic ClassMode of Action
PenicillinsBeta-Lactam inhibit peptidoglycan cross-links in bacterial cell wall
CephalosporinsBeta-Lactam inhibit peptidoglycan cross-links in bacterial cell wall
MacrolidesPeptidyltransferase Inhibitor
QuinolonesDNA Gyrase Inhibitor
TetracyclinesBind to 30S subunit of microbial ribosomes blocking attachment of aminoacyl-tRNA to the A site on the ribosome
NitrofurantoinDamages bacterial DNA via multiple reactive intermediaries
TrimethoprimDihydrofolate Reductase Inhibitor
